claims.assertion: Datasets with a Pre-training Alignment Index (PAI) above 80% achieve significantly higher downstream policy success rates with fewer fine-tuning epochs when using pre-trained foundation models.
claims.conditions: Targeting policies like OpenVLA, Octo, or Pi0.

evidence.notes: PAI is 85.3% when aligned with RT-1 dataset properties. Successful transfer observed in OpenVLA fine-tuning benchmarks.
PAI is 74.2% due to control frequency mismatch (50Hz vs 10Hz foundation models). Degraded performance observed unless target action interpolation is used.

falsification.condition: A target dataset with PAI < 50% achieving identical or better fine-tuning efficiency compared to a dataset with PAI > 80% under standard fine-tuning recipes.
